content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "success_popup_display",
      "input": {"status": "success"},
      "output": "Success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that the success popup displays the correct message."
    },
    {
      "name": "error_popup_display",
      "input": {"status": "error"},
      "output": "Error",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Ensures that an error status does not trigger a success popup."
    },
    {
      "name": "empty_status_popup",
      "input": {"status": ""},
      "output": "No status provided",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks behavior when no status is provided."
    },
    {
      "name": "null_status_popup",
      "input": {"status": null},
      "output": "No status provided",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates handling of null status input."
    },
    {
      "name": "unexpected_status_popup",
      "input": {"status": "unknown"},
      "output": "Unknown status",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests how the system reacts to an unexpected status."
    },
    {
      "name": "long_success_message",
      "input": {"status": "success", "message": "This is a very long success message that exceeds normal length."},
      "output": "Success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that long messages do not affect success popup display."
    },
    {
      "name": "multiple_success_calls",
      "input": [{"status": "success"}, {"status": "success"}],
      "output": ["Success", "Success"],
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks if multiple success calls are handled correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "success_with_additional_data",
      "input": {"status": "success", "data": {"id": 123}},
      "output": "Success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Ensures additional data does not affect the success message."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "The function handling the popup is deterministic and does not rely on external state.",
  "notes": "All tests should pass without introducing any failures or changes to existing functionality."
}
